translation_text: Of every ten three are ministers of life (to themselves); and three are ministers of death.
translation_text_raw: Of every ten three are ministers of life (to themselves); and three are ministers of death.

chinese_text: 人之生，動之死地，亦十有三。夫何故？
translation_text: There are also three in every ten whose aim is to live, but whose movements tend to the land (or place) of death. And for what reason?
translation_text_raw: There are also three in every ten whose aim is to live, but whose movements tend to the land (or place) of death. And for what reason?

chinese_text: 以其生生之厚。蓋聞善攝生者，陸行不遇兕虎，入軍不被甲兵；
translation_text: Because of their excessive endeavours to perpetuate life. But I have heard that he who is skilful in managing the life entrusted to him for a time travels on the land without having to shun rhinoceros or tiger, and enters a host without having to avoid buff coat or sharp weapon.
translation_text_raw: Because of their excessive endeavours to perpetuate life. But I have heard that he who is skilful in managing the life entrusted to him for a time travels on the land without having to shun rhinoceros or tiger, and enters a host without having to avoid buff coat or sharp weapon.

chinese_text: 兕無所投其角，虎無所措其爪，兵無所容其刃。夫何故？
translation_text: The rhinoceros finds no place in him into which to thrust its horn, nor the tiger a place in which to fix its claws, nor the weapon a place to admit its point. And for what reason?
translation_text_raw: The rhinoceros finds no place in him into which to thrust its horn, nor the tiger a place in which to fix its claws, nor the weapon a place to admit its point. And for what reason?

translation_text: Because there is in him no place of death.
translation_text_raw: Because there is in him no place of death.
